Class Utils

java.lang.Object
Networking.Utils
public class Utils extends Object
Utility class for networking operations. Provides methods to retrieve command line options and select network interfaces.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Retrieves the value of a command line option from the provided arguments.

    Gets the position of a command line option in the provided arguments.

    NetworkSelector(String[] args)
    Selects a network interface based on command line arguments or user input.

  • Constructor Details

    • Utils

      public Utils()

  • Method Details

    • getPosition

      public static int getPosition(String option, String[] args)
      Gets the position of a command line option in the provided arguments.
      Parameters:
      option - The command line option to search for.
      args - The array of command line arguments.
      Returns:
      The index of the option in the args array, or -1 if not found.

    • getOption

      public static String getOption(String option, String[] args)
      Retrieves the value of a command line option from the provided arguments.
      Parameters:
      option - The command line option to search for.
      args - The array of command line arguments.
      Returns:
      The value associated with the option, or null if not found or no value is provided.

    • NetworkSelector

      public static String NetworkSelector(String[] args)
      Selects a network interface based on command line arguments or user input. If no specific option is provided, it lists available network interfaces and prompts the user to select one.
      Parameters:
      args - The command line arguments.
      Returns:
      The selected network interface address as a string, or "localhost" if no valid selection is made.
